backward_compatibility.rationale: All changes scoped to gui/ directory. rm -rf gui/ safe. No API changes to bridge.py.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: No legacy code to remove. Changes are additive.

option_selection.rationale: Overlay-on-BesoGo with DOM Relocation — preserves working BesoGo internals, adds SVG overlay for score/PV visualization. Selected over replacement (B) and headless+custom (C) due to lower risk and prior failures with those approaches.
